title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 07 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 08/03/2023
Image reference: 2023-03-08_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-07-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Handysize values have firmed, other BC types remained stable
Capesize Elizabeth II (180,200 DWT, Jan 2007, Imabari) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 17.50 mil, VV Value USD 18.41 mil - DD Due. Supramax Supra Oniki (57,000 DWT, Jul 2010, Qingshan Shipyard) sold to unknown Indonesian buyers for USD 13.00 mil, VV Value USD 12.71 mil - DD Due. Supramax Maithili (55,700 DWT, Apr 2005, Oshima) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 11.50 mil, VV Value USD 12.18 mil - DD Due.
